channel.title: Force on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Force on Gajab Jobs

item.title: Indian Navy Agniveer MR Musician 02/2026 Batch Online Form
item.description: Indian Navy has released the Agniveer MR (Musician) Recruitment 2026 notification for unmarried male and female candidates across India. Eligible candidates can apply online from 11 April 2026 to 26 April 2026. The selection process includes shortlisting, physical fitness test, written exam, music ability test, and medical examination. Candidates must have passed Matric (10th) with minimum 50% marks along with musical skills. The job tenure is 4 years under the Agniveer scheme.
